TimeEntry.Title: new updates
TimeEntry.Notes:
• I worked on adding new pro tools in Adobe for forms.

  • Encountered several issues when trying to add text fields to a new PDF, as the PDF was protected.

  • I researched how to remove protection from documents using ChatGPT, since text fields couldn't be added to a protected PDF.

  • After spending some time, I resolved the issue and successfully added text fields to the complaint document.

  • The complaint document has 60-70 text fields, and 80% of the task is complete.

  • I uploaded the document to the alpha site.

  • Five other documents are still pending.

TimeEntry.Title: RALF: Bug fixes
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Reviewed the document to identify the font size issue.

  • Verified each text editor setting and found that the font size was set to Auto (Previous), which caused the issue.

  • Updated the setting to a fixed value, and the font size issue is now resolved in the Alpha environment, regardless of whether the text is large or small.

TimeEntry.Title: Update SSL Certificate for udtracker.richardcalterlawfirm.com.

TimeEntry.Title: RALF: Bug fixes
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Deployed validation form updates to live
  • Identified a bug in the complaint form: entering ZIP code 91932 does not auto-fill the address in field #17
  • Client reported that this feature was working in the previous version but is not working after the new updates
  • Verified the previous form and found it behaves the same as the current version
  • Informed the client to re-test using the previous form
  • Requested the client to provide the specific file number where the issue was observed
